data.title: NIIT USA to Inject Up to USD 300,000 into Brazil Subsidiary for Growth and Working Capital
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd ( (IN:NIITMTS) ) just unveiled an update.

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd has disclosed that its subsidiary NIIT USA Inc has approved an additional equity infusion of up to USD 300,000 into its step-down subsidiary NIIT Brazil LTDA to fund growth initiatives and working capital needs. The move is aimed at reinforcing NIIT’s Latin American operations and supporting services for its corporate learning customers in the region, while the company emphasized that the investment will not materially affect its consolidated financials and that NIIT Brazil will remain a wholly owned subsidiary within the group structure.

More about NIIT Learning Systems Ltd

NIIT Learning Systems Ltd, through its wholly owned subsidiary NIIT USA Inc, operates in the learning and training services industry, providing corporate learning solutions to clients globally. The group has been expanding its geographic footprint to support clients in multiple regions, including establishing NIIT Brazil LTDA as a platform to serve corporate learning group (CLG) customers and strengthen its presence in Latin America.

Average Trading Volume: 4,249

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 55.3B INR

For a thorough assessment of NIITMTS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Aja Health and Wellness Expands MyCare Ally Distribution and Upgrades GOeVisit EMR Platform
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Premier Diversified Holdings ( (TSE:AJA) ).

Aja Health and Wellness Inc. has expanded distribution of its MyCare Ally healthcare support program by signing a broker agreement with Greatway Financial Inc., a Canada-wide Insurance Managing General Agency that will market and solicit enrollments for the service in every province except Quebec, with marketing for the GOeVisit-powered service expected to start in early February 2026. The company is also upgrading its GOeVisit virtual care platform to a new electronic medical records system later this month, a move designed to enable monitored programs such as GLP-1-based weight management, lab requisition capabilities and broader virtual testing services, signalling an effort to deepen its digital health offering and enhance its competitiveness in the virtual care market.

More about Premier Diversified Holdings

Aja Health and Wellness Inc., listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, operates in the digital and virtual healthcare sector through subsidiaries Assured Diagnosis Inc. and Aja Health Inc. Its offerings include the GOeVisit virtual health consultation platform and the MyCare Ally full-spectrum healthcare support service, which combines virtual physician care, diagnostic coordination and secure digital health information for individuals and families across Canada.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Sell

Current Market Cap: C$469.2K

data.title: Jones Soda Sells Note, Enhances Liquidity with New Deal
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Jones Soda ( (JSDA) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 16, 2026, Jones Soda Co. agreed to sell a secured promissory note originally issued by MJ Reg Disrupters, LLC, assigning a remaining balance of $2 million on the note—previously due in installments through June 2028—to Two Shores Capital Corp. in exchange for a $1.4 million cash payment. As part of the transaction, Jones Soda also granted Two Shores Capital warrants to purchase 550,000 shares of its common stock at $0.40 per share, exercisable for three years, and stated that it plans to use the cash proceeds for general working capital, bolstering its liquidity and financial flexibility.

The most recent analyst rating on (JSDA) stock is a Hold with a $0.32 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jones Soda stock, see the JSDA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JSDA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JSDA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (ongoing losses and negative/free cash flow deterioration) and limited valuation support (negative P/E, no dividend). Offsetting factors include improving operating trends discussed on the earnings call and constructive technical momentum, with recent leadership and financing actions providing some operational and liquidity support.

To see Spark’s full report on JSDA stock, click here.

More about Jones Soda

Jones Soda Co. is a beverage company operating in the soft drinks industry, producing and selling flavored sodas and related beverages, with a focus on branded consumer products distributed through retail and other beverage channels.

data.title: Jaguar Health Executes Debt-Reducing Equity Warrant Transactions
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Jaguar Animal Health ( (JAGX) ) is now available.

On January 16, 2026, Jaguar Health executed a series of privately negotiated exchanges with Iliad Research and Trading and Streeterville Capital that reduced outstanding royalty interests and retired portions of its Series L and Series M perpetual preferred stock in return for issuing multiple pre-funded common stock purchase warrants. The transactions cut $1.19 million from an October 2020 royalty interest and $850,000 from an August 2022 royalty interest, and cancelled specified Series L and Series M preferred shares held by the two investors, while creating new pre-funded warrants exercisable at a nominal price and subject to a 9.99% ownership cap, effectively deleveraging the balance sheet at the cost of potential future equity dilution for existing shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (JAGX) stock is a Hold with a $0.82 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Jaguar Animal Health stock, see the JAGX Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on JAGX Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, JAGX is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance (large ongoing losses, high leverage, and heavy cash burn) and a bearish technical setup (trading below all major moving averages with negative MACD). Corporate events provide a meaningful positive offset via non-dilutive funding and encouraging clinical progress, but not enough to overcome current financial and trend risks.

To see Spark’s full report on JAGX stock, click here.

More about Jaguar Animal Health

Jaguar Health, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company that finances its operations in part through structured royalty interests and preferred stock issuances, indicating a capital-raising strategy focused on specialized securities and private transactions with institutional investors.

Average Trading Volume: 3,630,414

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $3.19M

Petmed Express ( (PETS) ) has provided an update.

At its January 21, 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders, PetMed Express reported that 15,506,165 of 21,372,021 eligible shares were represented in person or by proxy, constituting a quorum and allowing the company to conduct official business on the matters presented. Shareholders elected all five board nominees to serve until the next annual meeting, approved on an advisory basis the compensation of the company’s named executive officers, and ratified Baker Tilly US, LLP as the independent registered public accounting firm for fiscal year 2026, reinforcing continuity in governance, executive pay practices, and audit oversight for the company and its stakeholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (PETS) stock is a Hold with a $3.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Petmed Express stock, see the PETS Stock Forecast page.

The appointment of new leadership provides a potential positive outlook, but overall, the stock remains risky.

data.title: Frontline Locks In High-Rate VLCC Charters While Maintaining Spot Market Upside
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Frontline ( (FRO) ) has issued an update.

Frontline plc has secured one-year time charter-out agreements for seven of its VLCCs, with the contracts set to commence between late January and April 2026 at a daily rate of $76,900 per vessel, a level the company describes as not seen for decades. While locking in these attractive charter rates provides earnings visibility and underscores the strength of the current tanker market, Frontline will remain largely exposed to the spot market after the contracts take effect, preserving upside potential in what management characterizes as one of the most volatile shipping sectors.

The most recent analyst rating on (FRO) stock is a Hold with a $28.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Frontline stock, see the FRO Stock Forecast page.

More about Frontline

Frontline plc is an international shipping company focused on the crude oil transportation market, operating a fleet that includes Very Large Crude Carriers (VLCCs) and trading its shares on both the New York Stock Exchange and the Oslo Stock Exchange. The company’s business model is heavily exposed to the spot tanker market, positioning it to benefit from volatility and rate spikes in global crude oil seaborne trade.

Average Trading Volume: 3,035,559

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $5.77B

data.title: Qiagen Reports AFM Notification of DWS Investment’s 2.98% Voting Stake
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Qiagen ( (QGEN) ) is now available.

Qiagen disclosed that the Dutch Financial Markets Authority (AFM) has published a substantial shareholding notification indicating that DWS Investment GmbH holds 3,502,149 ordinary shares in Qiagen, corresponding to a 1.69% capital interest and 2.98% of voting rights, all held directly and on a real (not potential) basis. The announcement, which Qiagen notes is based solely on information from the AFM’s public register, highlights a notable institutional investor position in the company’s shareholder base but does not imply any operational changes, leaving the primary implication at the level of ownership structure and voting influence.

The most recent analyst rating on (QGEN) stock is a Buy with a $62.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Qiagen stock, see the QGEN Stock Forecast page.

More about Qiagen

Qiagen N.V., based in Venlo, the Netherlands, is a life sciences and molecular diagnostics company whose shares are listed on multiple European exchanges as well as the NYSE and Swiss markets, giving it broad international capital-market exposure.

Average Trading Volume: 1,650,733

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $11.47B

data.title: Brompton Wellington Square CLO ETFs Announce February Cash Distributions
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF Trust Unit ( (TSE:BAAA) ) has issued an announcement.

Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF and Brompton Wellington Square Investment Grade CLO ETF have declared cash distributions payable on February 13, 2026, to unitholders of record as of January 30, 2026, with the AAA CLO ETF paying $0.085 per unit in both Canadian and U.S. dollars and the Investment Grade CLO ETF paying $0.118 per Canadian-dollar unit and $0.119 per U.S.-dollar unit. The announced payouts reinforce Brompton’s positioning as an income-oriented ETF provider in the CLO space and provide current income visibility for investors seeking yield in structured credit, supported by Wellington Square’s long-standing specialization in CLO investments.

More about Brompton Wellington Square AAA CLO ETF Trust Unit

Brompton Funds, founded in 2000, is a Toronto-based investment fund manager specializing in income- and growth-focused solutions, including exchange-traded funds and other Toronto Stock Exchange–listed investment funds. Its CLO-focused ETFs are sub-advised by Wellington Square Advisors Inc., an independent Toronto investment advisory firm with more than a decade of experience investing in collateralized loan obligations (CLOs) and a team that includes former CLO managers.

Average Trading Volume: 4,861

For an in-depth examination of BAAA stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.
